script: echo '===== AAD users named Jesus ====='; az ad user list --filter "startswith(displayName,'Jesus')" --query "[].{name: displayName, upn: userPrincipalName, mail, id, jobTitle}" -o json 2>&1 | head -60; echo; echo '===== If empty, try first name match ====='; az ad user list --filter "startswith(givenName,'Jesus')" --query "[].{name: displayName, upn: userPrincipalName, mail, id, jobTitle}" -o json 2>&1 | head -40
